scripts.research:audit: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; for f in research/wiki/sources/*.md; do bun research/tools/audit-agent-ingest.ts --wiki "$f" --fail-under 10; done'
scripts.verify: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; node scripts/verify-slack-automation-identity.mjs; node scripts/verify-hermes-data-bot.mjs; node scripts/verify-nurtureany-sales-bot.mjs; node scripts/verify-launchbot.mjs; node --test ops/hermes/test/*.test.mjs; node scripts/verify-launch-superpower-bot.mjs; node scripts/verify-psm-ops-bot.mjs; bun research/tools/build-source-inventories.ts; for f in research/wiki/sources/*.md; do bun research/tools/audit-agent-ingest.ts --wiki "$f" --fail-under 10; done; node --test apps/bq-mcp-proxy/test/*.test.js'
